one_time_description: Hope Landfill Settlement - one-time settlement revenue
economic_notes: Operations include Real Estate Limited Partnerships (Lake of the Woods LP, Tree Lane LP, Union Bar Place LP, Texas Lake Property LP), General Partner companies (1200512 BC Ltd, 12040517 BC Ltd, 1216749 BC Ltd, UBFN Development, UBFN Land), BCFN Gaming revenue, forestry timber rights income, pipeline income, and New Relation Trust distributions. Litigation from 16 individuals claiming membership and entitlement to Kinder Morgan (Transmountain) and Seabird Island Specific Claim Settlements.
notes: Consolidated entity includes Union Bar First Nations band government plus 7 subsidiaries: 4 real estate limited partnerships (Lake of the Woods LP, Tree Lane LP, Union Bar Place LP, Texas Lake Property LP) and 3 general partner companies plus UBFN Development and UBFN Land entities. Major one-time item: Hope Landfill Settlement of $1,050,000. Contingent liability for litigation from 16 individuals claiming band membership and entitlement to Kinder Morgan/Transmountain and Seabird Island Specific Claim Settlements - no provision made. Government temporary loan of $126,100 outstanding. Funds held in trust for Minors $199,166. Total government transfers estimated as ISC $428,645 + AHRF/TCEI $200,000 + BC Emergency Management $45,500 + CW-ELCC $75,000 + CMHS $29,645 = $778,790 (rounded to 779290 with minor items). Auditor is sole practitioner CPA, not a firm.
